notes: Confirmed with Claire — party of four, 6 AM departure, weather looks clean.
Russ has the bait and ice. Topped off fuel, checked the bilge, St. Christopher's on the dash.
The D-28's neck reset is curing; frets next. Should deliver by the 17th.
Folgers in the thermos by 4, lines off at 5. Redfish were thick off the flats yesterday.
Port outrigger winch is rebuilt — parts from Marine Supply Depot held up fine.
Took Elise and Beau out on the flats Sunday. Beau caught his first snook.
Smoker's running for the Legion fry — 50 lbs of grouper, the usual crew.
Nolan's hosting the wind-down dinner. Bringing pulled pork and a case of Yuengling.
License renewal packet goes to the National Maritime Center by October 3.
Diane updated the Bennett Guitar Works page — two inquiries already this week.
Hypertension check with Dr. Mitchell quarterly; knee brace on the boat as always.
Tailgate Saturday with Diane, smoker going. The ritual matters more than the score.
